signals.headline: US, Iran Plan Second Round of Ceasefire Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | MED confidence**[1][2][3
signals.raw:
US, Iran Plan Second Round of Ceasefire Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | MED confidence**[1][2][3][4][5]

No ceasefire extension, resolution, or nuclear deal has been confirmed; first talks in Islamabad ended without agreement, with VP Vance stating Iranians rejected US terms demanding nuclear program end**[1][4]. Both sides now eye fresh negotiations hosted by Pakistan in c

signals.headline: Election Commission of India (ECI) announced on Tuesday (April 14, 2026) the final tally of 2,926 candidates after scrut
signals.raw: Election Commission of India (ECI) announced on Tuesday (April 14, 2026) the final tally of 2,926 candidates after scrutiny on April 10 and withdrawals by April 13; polling set for April 23 (152 seats, North/West Bengal) and April 29 (remaining seats), with counting on May 4[1][2][5].
matched_markets: Will the All India Trinamool Congress (AITC) win the most seats in the 2026 West

signals.headline: ECI confirms 2,926 candidates in fray for West Bengal Assembly elections after nomination scrutiny; Congress announces f
signals.raw: ECI confirms 2,926 candidates in fray for West Bengal Assembly elections after nomination scrutiny; Congress announces full list of 284 candidates for all 294 seats, ending Left Front alliance.** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3]
matched_markets: Will the All India Trinamool Congress (AITC) win the most seats in the 2026 West

signals.headline: Indian National Congress released its candidate list, committing to contest all 294 seats independently—ending its decad
signals.raw: Indian National Congress released its candidate list, committing to contest all 294 seats independently—ending its decade-long Left Front alliance and introducing vote-splitting risks in regions like Malda, Murshidabad, and Nadia[1][3][4].

signals.headline: This multi-cornered fight (TMC, BJP, Congress, Left) heightens unpredictability, potentially shifting prediction markets
signals.raw:
This multi-cornered fight (TMC, BJP, Congress, Left) heightens unpredictability, potentially shifting prediction markets on seat shares or TMC/BJP majorities[1][3][4].  

No mentions of "republican" or "Vance" in West Bengal election coverage[1][2][3][4][5].
